title: Game Project
description: Root descriptor for a Creation Suite game project folder. Written by the editor, read by all tools and the engine.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference (used by editors for validation hints).

version.description: Project format version (SemVer). Bump major on breaking changes.

name.description: Human-readable project name shown in the editor title bar.

engineVersion.description: Minimum engine version required to open this project.

defaultScene.description: Relative path to the scene file to load on startup.

contentRoot.description: Relative path to the raw source asset directory.

cookedRoot.description: Relative path to the runtime-ready cooked asset directory.

assetRegistry.description: Relative path to the asset registry file.

settings.description: Project-level settings (display name, icon, target platform, etc.)
